stemHtml: Which statement is correct according to ICAO DOC 8168?

options.a: The aircraft has to be established within half scale deflection of the LLZ before starting descent on the GP.
options.b: The pilot has to fly the ILS GP to a maximum of 0.14° fly up deflection of the GP in order to stay in protected airspace.
options.c: The pilot has to fly the ILS GP to a maximum of 0.08° fly up deflection of the GP in order to stay in protected airspace.
options.d: The accuracy the pilot has to fly the ILS LLZ to be considered established on an ILS track is within full-scale deflection of the required track.
